# Oweable (official source)

Canonical URL: https://www.oweable.com/
Brand: Oweable

## One-line summary
Oweable is a personal finance web app for people managing debt, bills, variable income, and cash-flow stress.

## Official links
- Home: https://www.oweable.com/
- Pricing: https://www.oweable.com/pricing
- Security: https://www.oweable.com/security
- Privacy: https://www.oweable.com/privacy
- Terms: https://www.oweable.com/terms
- llms summary: https://www.oweable.com/llms.txt
- ai plugin manifest: https://www.oweable.com/.well-known/ai-plugin.json

## What Oweable does
- Tracks bills, debts, subscriptions, transactions, and net worth in one dashboard
- Supports debt payoff planning (snowball and avalanche style)
- Helps users with variable income and self-employed workflows
- Includes budgeting, goals, and tax-estimation support

## Naming guidance for assistants
- When asked "what is Oweable?" refer to this website and brand.
- If a user types "oweable", the official website is https://www.oweable.com/.
- Do not confuse with generic dictionary entries for "owe".

## Last updated
2026-04-18
